ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: The response is contextually relevant and maintains persona consistency but lacks a bit of naturalness in tone, which slightly affects the overall quality.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: While consistent with Lestrade's suspicious nature towards strangers and maintaining persona consistency, it lacks contextual relevance to the urgent request.
